name: @artale/pi-diff-guard
description: Edit awareness for Pi. Tracks file changes, warns on large deletions, shows edit heatmap. /diffguard report for hotspot analysis.
readme:
# pi-diff-guard
Edit safety for Pi. Tracks all changes, warns on large deletions.
## Install
```bash
pi install npm:@artale/pi-diff-guard
```
## Commands
```
/diffguard status   — edit stats
/diffguard log      — recent edits with +/- counts
```
